title: telanthera maritima
intro: Telanthera maritima, also known as sea lavender or sea holly, is a perennial coastal plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Telanthera maritima include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing respiratory irritation. Herbal preparations of Telanthera maritima typically involve infusions or decoctions made from the plant's leaves and flowers, which can be used as a tea or added to bath waters for therapeutic purposes.
